title: TraceBeacon
description: One row per LLM request. Anonymized. NO prompt content, NO response content, NO API keys, NO headers. Wire size ~200 bytes.

schema_version.description: Pinned to v1 for this release. Bumps with breaking shape changes.

ts.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp at request start.

install_id.description: Per-install UUID generated on first run. Stable for the install's lifetime. Not joinable across installs.

install_hmac.description: HMAC-SHA256 over the canonical beacon JSON (excluding this field), keyed by the install's locally-stored secret. Worker verifies against KV-stored (install_id -> secret) row.

region.description: Optional region code (e.g. 'us-east-1', 'eu-west-1'). Empty when unknown.

status_code.description: HTTP status from the provider response.

latency_ms_to_first_token.description: Time from request send to first SSE token. Null/missing for non-streaming.

cost_usd_estimate.description: Optional client-side cost estimate. Computed from a shared price table; not authoritative.
